asr_text: bhai scholarship ke liye eligibility kya hai for undergrad admission
mujhe admission form apply kaise karna hai aur last date kab hai
fees structure private college ka approx kitna hota hai and any government seat?
documents kya chahiye for admission like certificate waghera
cutoff kaise calculate hota hai merit list me
rag pipeline kya hota hai retrieval augmented generation simple explain
faiss index build ka best way kya hai for sentence embeddings
Admission process ka pura step kya hota hai from registration to counselling?
Agar income certificate nahi hai to scholarship milegi ya nahi?
Private college me fees zyada hoti hai ya govt me?
Merit list kab nikalti hai aur cutoff kaise decide hota hai?
Form bharte time kaunse documents scan karke rakhne chahiye?
